---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new skill, capability, or change to an existing one
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What problem does this solve

Describe the gap or friction this addresses.

## Proposed change

What you'd like to add or change. If it touches an existing skill, note which one (`llm-council`, `legal:review-contract`, `legal:meeting-briefing`, `conseil-agents`) and check whether a spec exists under `.specify/`.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you didn't pick them.

## Additional context

Anything else useful: related issues, links, mockups.
